ramble.label: Ramble
ramble.description: Clean up rambling speech into clear prose (local)
ramble.prompt: Turn this rambling transcription into clear, well-punctuated prose. Remove filler words and false starts. Keep the original meaning and wording. Output only the cleaned text, with no preamble or commentary.

code.label: Code changes
code.description: Summarize as a commit message / code-change note (local)
code.prompt: Rewrite the transcript as a concise software commit message in imperative mood. Output only the message, with no preamble or commentary.

email.label: Email
email.prompt: Rewrite the transcript as a clear, professional email body. Do not add a greeting or sign-off unless dictated. Output only the email text, with no preamble or commentary.
